name: a1_security_review_cli_retry_20260421
outcome_goal: Every high-trust seam has been reviewed via the security-review skill and every finding is either a dedupe-keyed bug or a decision.YYYY-MM-DD.security-review-ack-* row.

jobs.label: a1_security_review
jobs.prompt: Run the security-review skill against the high-trust seams. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/docker_runner.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/webhook.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integration_manifest.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/operator_write.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/rest.py. File a canonical bug per finding with signature security-review-$(date -I)-<category>. If a seam is intentionally accepted, file operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.security-review-ack-<category>. Done when every category has either a bug or an ack decision. Transport constraint: use CLI only; do not use Anthropic API or any llm_task route.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "bugs=$(praxis workflow bugs --signature-contains security-review-$(date -I) --state-in-open 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); acks=$(psql postgresql://localhost:5432/praxis -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key LIKE 'decision.%.security-review-ack-%' AND effective_to IS NULL\"); test ${bugs:-0} -ge 3 -o ${acks:-0} -ge 1"
